description: Style Note This bag from fabindia references authentic Indian style with its materials and design details. Epitomise the ethnic boho chic look when you match this to Indian ensembles or pair it with a dress and heels for a great Indo-Western fusion. Product Details Blue sling bag with embroidered detail in front and tassels with bead detail One long fabric strap One main compartment with a triangular flap and a press button closure Material and Care Cotton Size Length: 20 cm Width: 16 cm
